category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Turkmenistan.

target_market_label.zh: 土库曼斯坦（Turkmenstandartlary / 国家电力）
target_market_label.zht: 土庫曼斯坦（Turkmenstandartlary / 國家電力）

title.en: China-to-Turkmenistan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入土库曼斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入土庫曼斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Turkmenistan Turkmenstandartlary conformity requirements, Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context, IEC 61851 safety baseline, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, and China GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 baselines. Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member; EAC / TR CU certification is not the applicable route, and domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity applies.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与土库曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary合格评定要求、Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz电网环境、IEC 61851安全基线、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量证据，以及中国GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员；EAC / TR CU认证不是适用途径，适用国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與土庫曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary合格評定要求、Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz電網環境、IEC 61851安全基線、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC及電能質量證據，以及中國GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。土庫曼斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員；EAC / TR CU認證不是適用途徑，適用國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Turkmenistan, the practical gaps are Turkmenstandartlary domestic conformity assessment, Turkmenenergo project acceptance for any grid-connected installation on the 220/380 V 50 Hz state grid, IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC where IEC-aligned chargers are specified, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, and thermal derating for desert heat. Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member, so there is no EAC / TR CU route for EV charger market access. China GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, and GB/T 27930 DC communication are useful China baselines but are not accepted as substitutes for Turkmenistan project requirements; GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 and require hardware redesign. The EV market is essentially non-existent and charging infrastructure is impractical at scale in a gas-rich state economy, so exporters should treat opportunities as project-specific rather than broad retail-market demand.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入土库曼斯坦时，实际差距包括Turkmenstandartlary国内合格评定、任何接入220/380 V 50 Hz国家电网的安装项目须取得Turkmenenergo项目验收、IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据、在项目指定IEC体系时采用交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量证据，以及沙漠高温下的热降额。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员，因此电动汽车充电桩市场准入不存在EAC / TR CU路径。中国GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信可作为中国基线，但不能替代土库曼斯坦项目要求；GB/T接口与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2物理不兼容，须进行硬件重新设计。该国电动汽车市场基本不存在，且在天然气资源丰富的国家经济结构下大规模充电基础设施实用性有限，出口商应将机会视为项目特定需求，而非广泛零售市场需求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入土庫曼斯坦時，實際差距包括Turkmenstandartlary國內合格評定、任何接入220/380 V 50 Hz國家電網的安裝項目須取得Turkmenenergo項目驗收、IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據、在項目指定IEC體系時採用交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、IEC 61000 EMC及電能質量證據，以及沙漠高溫下的熱降額。土庫曼斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員，因此電動汽車充電樁市場准入不存在EAC / TR CU路徑。中國GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊可作為中國基線，但不能替代土庫曼斯坦項目要求；GB/T接口與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2物理不兼容，須進行硬體重新設計。該國電動汽車市場基本不存在，且在天然氣資源豐富的國家經濟結構下大規模充電基礎設施實用性有限，出口商應將機會視為項目特定需求，而非廣泛零售市場需求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Turkmenstandartlary conformity scope determination, Turkmenenergo grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Turkmenistan conformity assessment rules, Turkmenenergo project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member; EAC / TR CU certification confers no automatic market-access rights in Turkmenistan.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、Turkmenstandartlary合格评定范围裁定、Turkmenenergo并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行土库曼斯坦合格评定规则、Turkmenenergo项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员；EAC / TR CU认证在土库曼斯坦不赋予自动市场准入权利。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、Turkmenstandartlary合格評定範圍裁定、Turkmenenergo併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行土庫曼斯坦合格評定規則、Turkmenenergo項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。土庫曼斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員；EAC / TR CU認證在土庫曼斯坦不賦予自動市場准入權利。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
